Middleware misuse: unresolved, wrong signature, bad reference grammar.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

func NotMiddleware(s string) string { return s }

//fabrik:http:middleware
func Wrong(s string) string { return s }

type T struct{}

//fabrik:http:middleware
func (t *T) Method(next http.Handler) http.Handler { return next }

//fabrik:http GET /a middleware=Missing
func A(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /b middleware=NotMiddleware
func B(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /c middleware=bad-ref
func C(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /d middleware=nosuchpkg.Fn
func D(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:7:1: middleware Wrong has the wrong signature
  help: want func(next http.Handler) http.Handler
error: web/web.go:12:1: //fabrik:http:middleware must be on a package-level function (func Method is a method)
  help: move the middleware out of the method set
error: web/web.go:15:33: cannot resolve middleware Missing
  help: expected a package-level func(next http.Handler) http.Handler
error: web/web.go:18:33: middleware NotMiddleware has the wrong signature
  help: want func(next http.Handler) http.Handler
error: web/web.go:21:33: invalid middleware reference "bad-ref"
  help: use Name or pkg.Name, comma-separated
error: web/web.go:24:33: cannot resolve middleware nosuchpkg.Fn
  help: expected a package-level func(next http.Handler) http.Handler
